title: slavakurilyak/awesome-ai-agents: a directory of 300+ agent resources
friendlyTitle: A large list of AI agent tools and learning resources
summary: Awesome AI Agents is a curated index of more than 300 agent projects, frameworks and learning resources. The repository is trending with roughly 2,000 GitHub stars at publication time.
friendlySummary: This repository collects more than 300 AI agent projects, frameworks and guides in one place.
whyItMatters: Builders can use the directory to compare agent frameworks, find examples and map the ecosystem before choosing a stack. Curated lists vary in freshness and depth, so verify maintenance, licenses and security at each original repository.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It is a useful starting point for exploring agent tools. Check that each project is active, safe and licensed for your needs.
